subject: Add ingress nginx common template
commit_message:
Add ingress nginx common template

Add ingress common template, template can be
included in a components ingress configuration.

Signed-off-by: Lucjan Bryndza <l.bryndza@samsung.com>
Change-Id: Ic18626ca679c8cbc6ce7aee95ac4b9c40dc5bcfe
Issue-ID: OOM-1508

Patch Set 12:

Howto test ingress nginx controller patches.

vid component has ingress configuration enabled for testing purposes via configuration override file :

onap/resources/overrides/onap-all-ingress-nginx.yaml


Example VID configuration can be deployed using following command:

 
        helm deploy dev local/onap --namespace onap -f onap/resources/overrides/onap-all-ingress-nginx.yaml
     
     
    After deploying vid component is mapped via ingress controller using following configuration:

    Name:             dev-vid-vid-ingress
    Namespace:        onap
    Address:          
    Default backend:  default-http-backend:80 (<none>)
    Rules:
    Host  Path  Backends
    ----  ----  --------
    *     
        /vid   vid:8080 (<none>)
    Annotations:
        nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/ssl-redirect:  false

  
  
VID component is available via URLs:

    http://portal.api.simpledemo.onap.org/vid/healthCheck
    https://portal.api.simpledemo.onap.org/vid/healthCheck
    
 


Example configuration for vid components looks like bellow:
    
    
vid:
  enabled: true
  ingress:
   enabled: true
   service:
       - path: "/vid"
         name: "vid"
         port: 8080
   annotations: 
         nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/ssl-redirect: "false"



    Where the name is the service name 
    port is the internal port number of the service
    
    Extra configuration for particular service can be changed using nginx annotations
    More details  about nginx ingress annotations are available here:

        https://kubernetes.github.io/ingress-nginx/user-guide/nginx-configuration/annotations/
